description_long: This ottoman features a boxy, square form with a generously padded top cushion and a quilted diamond pattern on its sides. The upholstery is a deep, rich burgundy color, giving it a luxurious and modern appearance. The cushion appears plush and slightly rounded at the edges, providing a comfortable seating surface. The sides are adorned with a prominent diamond-tufted design, adding texture and visual interest. There are no visible legs, giving the ottoman a grounded, monolithic look. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or composite frame beneath the upholstery, with foam padding for comfort.
description: A square, burgundy ottoman with a plush, rounded cushion top and diamond-tufted sides, upholstered in faux leather and lacking visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded cushion top and the diamond-tufted pattern on the side, with the cushion slightly overhanging the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same diamond-tufted pattern and the seamless transition between the cushion and base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the cushion and tufted base fully visible and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with the same quilted pattern and cushion overhang.
